description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a small deer or fawn, featuring a dark black base color adorned with vibrant pink floral or firework-like patterns across its body. The toy has a large, round white eye with a black pupil, giving it a whimsical and expressive appearance. Its ears are upright and pointed, and the tail is short and slightly raised. The legs are stubby and rounded, contributing to a soft, cuddly look. The surface appears to be made of a soft fabric, likely polyester or cotton, and the toy is filled with a lightweight stuffing material. The overall design is playful and eye-catching, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A plush deer-shaped stuffed toy with a black base and vivid pink floral patterns, featuring a large white eye and upright ears. Its soft, rounded form and whimsical design make it visually striking and cuddly.
description_view_0: The left side of the deer is visible, showing the large white eye, upright ear, and detailed pink patterns on the body and legs.
description_view_1: A rear view of the toy, highlighting the symmetry of the ears, the short tail, and the pink patterns running along the back.
description_view_2: The right side of the deer is shown, with the large eye, upright ear, and pink patterns mirrored from the left side.
description_view_3: A front view of the toy, displaying both upright ears, the rounded face, and the placement of the legs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with a large, wide-open eye and no visible mouth or eyebrows. The eye gives the toy a whimsical and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head slightly raised and ears upright, giving an alert and playful posture.
